steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence states that Santo Domingo Pueblo covers 106.3 square miles and says the student is comparing it to Nambé Pueblo's area. The blank must be filled with Nambé Pueblo's total area as shown in the table — not any other nation's area.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '47.3 square miles': This is the area of a different Pueblo nation from the table — not Nambé Pueblo. ✗
  • Choice B — '32.4 square miles': This is the total area listed for Nambé Pueblo in the table. It correctly completes the comparison. ✓
  • Choice C — '77.1 square miles': This is the area of yet another Pueblo nation from the table — not Nambé Pueblo. ✗
  • Choice D — '595.7 square miles': This is the area of another Pueblo nation from the table — not Nambé Pueblo. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
